title: Ruined Portal Only (Neoforge)
description: Nether portals can be lit only at ruined portal structure sites
body:
Ruined portal only - nether portal lighting is disabled except at ruined portal structure sites. This applies both in the overworld and in the nether. Don't break the return portal generated for you by the game, you will not be able to go back!

Heavily inspired by [https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-portal-nerf](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-portal-nerf). But for Neoforge 1.21.

Try it in combination with my [Same size return portal](https://modrinth.com/mod/same-size-return-portal) mod!
